raw_consumer_statement: On XXXX XXXX XXXX I made an online purchase, using the Costco Anywhere Visa Card by Citibank. Citibank sent me a message stating that the transaction didn't go through. I had to use an alternative method of payment ( it was paid for by my friend using the XXXX bank account ). However, several days later I noticed that the charge appeared on my Costco Anywhere Visa Card by Citibank, as a result I was charged twice. I disputed the charge with Citibank and they requested the proof that I used an alternative method of payment. I have provided the receipt that showed the date, the vendor, the amount charged, the card number and the name of the card holder. Citibank twice rejected that document and when I called them on XXXX XXXX XXXX and asked why Citibank customer service manager stated that the document that I provided was in XXXX and that they do not accept the documents XXXX XXXX XXXX I indicated that XXXX is the second official language in the US and that a foreign bank can not provide documents in English if it's not their official language. Citibank representative didn't accept my argument. Given that even the answering service for Citibank credit cards customer service has an option for XXXX, I don't believe that Citibank doesn't have expertise to process the documents in XXXX. So I am filing this complaint because in my opinion Citibank is denying me the service under a false pretext.
